message:
feat: create master templates, update embed directive

Add system.md.tmpl and subagent.md.tmpl master templates.
Update //go:embed to cover prompts/templates/* and prompts/sections/*.
Add TestMasterTemplates_Parse to verify templates parse correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ import (
 	"strings"
 )
 
-//go:embed prompts/*.md
+//go:embed prompts/*.md prompts/templates/* prompts/sections/*
 var embeddedPrompts embed.FS
 
 // PromptSource describes one component of the composed system prompt.
